title: Speculative Retrieval: Cutting RAG Latency with Draft-then-Verify Lookups
why: Sample/demo data. Two-stage retrieval cuts tail latency without hurting recall — directly applicable to any RAG layer that's latency-bound.

title: Rubric-Grounded Self-Critique Beats Constitutional Prompts on Small Models
why: Sample/demo data. A fixed scoring rubric in the critique step outperforms freeform self-critique for 3B-7B models — cheap quality win for a local scorer.
suggested_action: Evaluate for the scoring pipeline: swap freeform critique for a fixed rubric and A/B the score agreement on a held-out set.

title: Event-Log Memory: Append-Only Stores Outperform Vector DBs for Agent Recall
why: Sample/demo data. Append-only event logs with cheap tags beat embedding stores on precision for time-anchored agent recall — validates the events.db approach.
suggested_action: Read in full and assess fit for the event-log brain; draft a one-paragraph take.
